calendar.matters:
NAME CHANGE CALENDAR
Off Calendar Oct-08-2015 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled this day for OSC hearing for Name Change.
Dept. 514, Judge: Charles Crompton, Clerk: S. Vantree. Case not called on the record. Proceedings not reported.

Petitioner SARAH ANTOINETTE SELLERS present in court.
Petitioner sworn.
Proof of Publication on file.

No objections to the proposed change of name were made at the hearing.
It appears to the satisfaction of the Court that all the allegations in the petition are true, correct and sufficient, and the petition should be granted.

The court grants the petition for Change of Name from SARAH ANTOINETTE SELLERS to new name SAHRA ANTOINETTE SELLERS

Decree Changing Name signed by the court.
